title: habenaria rhodocheila subsp. rhodocheila
intro: Habenaria rhodocheila subsp. rhodocheila is a species of orchid, specifically a terrestrial orchid native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas and parts of Southeast Asia. It is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, with reported medicinal properties including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or as a powder, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential side effects and interactions with other medications.
